preconditions: User is not authenticated before starting each test

testCases.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state for unauthenticated user
steps: Launch the application in a new browser session
Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Wait for the Home page to finish loading
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page loads successfully in guest state, the browser URL contains /washtabui/home, and all approved guest-state controls are displayed without authenticated user indicators.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button opens Login page from guest Home state
steps: Navigate to the Home page as a guest user
Click the Person/Profile button
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page or Login view is displayed and the guest Home state transitions into the login workflow without authenticating the user automatically.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button navigates to customer-search page
steps: Navigate to the Home page as a guest user
Click the Customer signup button
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates to the customer-search page and the customer-search workflow view is displayed successfully for a guest user.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button navigates to vehicle-survey page
steps: Navigate to the Home page as a guest user
Click the Clean survey button
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates to the vehicle-survey page and the vehicle-survey workflow is displayed while remaining in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button navigates to survey page
steps: Navigate to the Home page as a guest user
Click the Site survey button
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates to the survey page and the survey workflow is displayed successfully from the guest Home state.

testCases.title: Verify authenticated-only controls are not visible in guest Home state
steps: Navigate to the Home page without signing in
Inspect the Home page shell controls and visible feature buttons
testCases.expectedResult: Authenticated-only controls and authenticated-only feature buttons are absent or remain inaccessible while the user is unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Back button returns user to Home page after navigating to Customer signup page
steps: Navigate to the Home page as a guest user
Click the Customer signup button
After the customer-search page opens click the Back button
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state and all approved guest-state controls are visible again.

testCases.title: Verify Home button returns user to Home page after navigating to Clean survey page
steps: Navigate to the Home page as a guest user
Click the Clean survey button
After the vehicle-survey page opens click the Home button
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state and guest-accessible controls remain visible and enabled.

testCases.title: Verify Home button returns user to Home page after navigating to Site survey page
steps: Navigate to the Home page as a guest user
Click the Site survey button
After the survey page opens click the Home button
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state and the Person/Profile button and guest-accessible feature buttons are displayed again.

testCases.title: Verify Back button from Login page returns to Home page guest state
steps: Navigate to the Home page as a guest user
Click the Person/Profile button
When the Login page or Login view opens click the Back button
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page or Login view closes and the application returns to the Home page guest state with approved guest controls visible.

testCases.title: Verify Home button from Login page returns to Home page guest state
steps: Navigate to the Home page as a guest user
Click the Person/Profile button
When the Login page or Login view opens click the Home button
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates back to the Home page guest state and no authenticated account details are displayed.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button is visible enabled and stable in guest Home state
steps: Navigate to the Home page as a guest user
Locate the Notification button
Click the Notification button once
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button remains visible and enabled and clicking it does not freeze the interface, remove guest controls, redirect unexpectedly, or display application errors.

testCases.title: Verify direct navigation to Home URL opens guest Home state
steps: Open a fresh browser session without authentication
Enter http://localhost/washtabui/home directly in the browser address bar
Wait for the application to load
testCases.expectedResult: The application opens directly into the Home page guest state and displays only guest-accessible controls and shared Home controls.

testCases.title: Verify Home button behavior when already on Home page guest state
steps: Navigate to the Home page as a guest user
Click the Home button while remaining on the Home page
testCases.expectedResult: The application remains on the Home page guest state without navigation loops, duplicate rendering, unexpected reload behavior, or disappearance of guest-state controls.

testCases.title: Verify Back button behavior when guest user is already on initial Home page
steps: Open a fresh browser session
Navigate directly to the Home page
Click the Back button without prior in-application navigation
testCases.expectedResult: The application handles the Back action gracefully without crashing, exposing authenticated content, displaying script errors, or corrupting the Home page state.

testCases.title: Verify guest-accessible feature buttons remain available after returning from secondary page
steps: Navigate to the Home page as a guest user
Click the Customer signup button
Use the Back button to return to the Home page
Observe the Customer signup, Clean survey, and Site survey buttons
testCases.expectedResult: After returning to the Home page all guest-accessible feature buttons remain visible, enabled, and available for continued interaction.

testCases.title: Verify guest Home state remains unauthenticated after navigating through multiple guest workflows
steps: Navigate to the Home page as a guest user
Click the Customer signup button and return to the Home page
Click the Clean survey button and return to the Home page
Click the Site survey button and return to the Home page
testCases.expectedResult: The user remains in guest state throughout all navigation flows and no authenticated-only control or logged-in user name becomes visible.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button remains visible after returning from Login page
steps: Navigate to the Home page as a guest user
Click the Person/Profile button
Return to the Home page using the Back button
Observe the Person/Profile button
testCases.expectedResult: The Person/Profile button is visible enabled and available for interaction after returning from the Login page.

testCases.title: Verify guest-accessible feature buttons can be opened sequentially without application instability
steps: Navigate to the Home page as a guest user
Open the Customer signup page and return to Home
Open the Clean survey page and return to Home
Open the Site survey page and return to Home
testCases.expectedResult: Each guest-accessible workflow opens successfully and the Home page remains stable and usable after sequential navigation.
